p2p_enrichment.notes: Added 3 pass-to-pass tests from repo CI/CD: (1) test_repo_check_engines_override - runs pnpm check-engines-override, (2) test_repo_prettier_cli - runs pnpm prettier --check packages/cli/src, (3) test_repo_eslint_cli_modified - runs pnpm eslint on MCP.ts and bin.ts. Discovered CI commands from package.json scripts: lint, prettier-check, check-engines-override, build. TypeScript typecheck not usable due to monorepo workspace dependency issues. Tests target only the modified files/packages to stay within 120s timeout.
